shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.scopeNote: Editor shortcuts apply when the prompt body field is focused.

prompts.title: Prompts
prompts.lead: Create keys, edit drafts with {'{{'}name{'}}'} placeholders, snapshot versions, and point channels at a frozen version.
prompts.pickNs: Select a namespace in the top bar to manage prompts.
prompts.archivedReadOnly: This namespace is archived. You can open prompts to inspect content, but writes are blocked from the API.
prompts.archivedNoWrite: Archived namespace: save draft, snapshot, and pointer changes are disabled.
prompts.emptyList: No prompts in this namespace yet.
prompts.releaseLead: Save the draft, snapshot an immutable version, then point the channel at that version — all in one place.
prompts.historyEmpty: No snapshots yet. Freeze the current draft above to create the first version.
prompts.varsEmpty: Use {'{{'}name{'}}'} in the draft — variables are detected automatically.
prompts.sampleValuesHint: Shown in editor as {'{{'}name:value{'}}'} for preview only — values are not saved with the draft.
prompts.previewHint: {{name}} placeholders use letters, digits, and underscore inside the braces (same rules as the API).
prompts.snapshotVersionHint: Leave empty for {next}; custom must be major.minor.patch (e.g. 1.2.3)
prompts.publishVersionEmpty: No snapshots yet. Create one with “Snapshot from draft” above.
prompts.diffPickHint: Pick two versions from the list or selectors — diff runs automatically.
prompts.diffSameVersion: Choose two different versions to compare.
prompts.noPointer: No pointer yet for this channel.
prompts.schemaNotArray: Schema must be a JSON array
prompts.schemaEmptyName: Schema entry has an empty name
prompts.schemaInvalidName: Invalid variable name: {name} (use only letters, digits, underscore)
prompts.undeclaredPlaceholder: Placeholder {placeholder} used in body but not declared in schema
prompts.unusedSchemaVar: Variable {name} declared in schema but not used in body
prompts.varNameInvalid: Use letters, digits, and underscore only
prompts.sampleInputsHint: Type values to preview how your prompt renders
prompts.unsavedMessage: You edited this prompt draft but haven’t saved it yet.

home.heroLead: Inkforge is infrastructure for teams that treat prompts like code — namespaces, keys, audited releases, and a path to resolve what production actually runs.
home.sectionFeaturesLead: Inspired by developer-first landing pages — clear modules, readable copy, and concrete capabilities instead of fluff.
home.feat1Body: Isolate work by namespace, iterate on drafts, freeze versions, and point environments at the channel that should resolve.
home.feat2Body: Rotate namespace keys, constrain scope, and keep programmatic access auditable alongside human sign-in through this console.
home.feat3Body: Align runtime behavior with console truth: fetch published prompts by channel, validate parameters, and render predictable templates from your services.
home.sessionLeadPrefix: Phone-backed identity for the console · details load from
home.signedOutBody: Authenticate with your phone account to hydrate session detail in this dashboard card.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Phone number and password for the console.
login.invalidPhone: Enter a valid mainland China mobile number.
login.passwordMin: Password must be at least {n} characters.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Mainland mobile and a password (minimum {n} characters).
register.invalidPhone: Enter a valid mainland China mobile number.
register.passwordMin: Password must be at least {n} characters.

nav.tooltipSoon: This entry will activate once the feature ships.

workspace.welcomeLead: Pick a namespace in the top bar, then search or create prompts below.
workspace.archivedDialogLead: Read-only. Switch to inspect, or restore to edit again.
workspace.nsCreateQuotaHelp: When unset, inherits the account/platform merge (see docs). Zero may mean unlimited depending on tier.
workspace.nsArchiveDialogMessage: Writes (new drafts, snapshots, pointer changes) stop until you restore.
workspace.nsRestoreDialogMessage: This unlocks prompts, versions, and pointer changes again. Continue?
workspace.settingsTeamHint: Team workspaces, invitations, and role-based edits are planned for Inkforge Team plans. Nothing on this screen enables shared namespaces today.
workspace.settingsIntro: Basic information for the account you are signed in with.
workspace.comingSoonBody: This area is still being wired up. Use the sidebar to return to your workspace or read the docs.
